notes: Folder restore no longer auto-plays the saved track. Auto-loaded tracks (silent restore on app open AND 'Resume previous folder' tap) now load to a stopped state — user explicitly taps Play to start. This also addresses the lingering 'audio stalls a few seconds in' bug: the prior auto-play attempt during folder restore was leaving the audio element in a fragile state on mobile Chrome, where the next user-gesture play would start but stall shortly after. Track-selection (dropdown / prev / next / track-end auto-advance) still auto-plays as before.
